ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA-NeMo/Speech
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA-NeMo/Speech
Language: python
A scalable generative AI framework built for researchers and developers working on Large Language Models, Multimodal, and Speech AI (Automatic Speech Recognition and Text-to-Speech)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA/SkillSpector
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA/SkillSpector
Language: python
Security scanner for AI agent skills. Detect vulnerabilities, malicious patterns, and security risks.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NanmiCoder/MediaCrawler
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NanmiCoder/MediaCrawler
Language: python
小红书笔记 | 评论爬虫、抖音视频 | 评论爬虫、快手视频 | 评论爬虫、B 站视频 ｜ 评论爬虫、微博帖子 ｜ 评论爬虫、百度贴吧帖子 ｜ 百度贴吧评论回复爬虫 | 知乎问答文章｜评论爬虫

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Panniantong/Agent-Reach
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Panniantong/Agent-Reach
Language: python
Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Robbyant/lingbot-map
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Robbyant/lingbot-map
Language: python
A feed-forward 3D foundation model for reconstructing scenes from streaming data

ns0:entry.ns0:title: THUDM/slime
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/THUDM/slime
Language: python
slime is an LLM post-training framework for RL Scaling.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Unclecheng-li/VulnClaw
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Unclecheng-li/VulnClaw
Language: python
基于 AI Agent + MCP 工具链 + 渗透 Skill 编排， 配合大语言模型， 自然语言输入 → 自动完成「信息收集 → 漏洞发现 → 漏洞利用 → 报告生成」全流程。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis
Language: python
LLM 驱动的多市场股票智能分析系统：多源行情、实时新闻、决策看板与自动推送，支持零成本定时运行。 LLM-powered multi-market stock analysis system with multi-source market data, real-time news, decision dashboard, automated notifications, and cost-free scheduled runs.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aws/agent-toolkit-for-aws
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aws/agent-toolkit-for-aws
Language: python
Official, AWS-supported MCP servers, skills, and plugins to help AI agents build on AWS

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bytedance/deer-flow
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bytedance/deer-flow
Language: python
An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: calesthio/OpenMontage
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/calesthio/OpenMontage
Language: python
World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: comet-ml/opik
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/comet-ml/opik
Language: python
Debug, evaluate, and monitor your LLM applications, RAG systems, and agentic workflows with comprehensive tracing, automated evaluations, and production-ready dashboards.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: commaai/openpilot
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/commaai/openpilot
Language: python
openpilot is an operating system for robotics. Currently, it upgrades the driver assistance system on 300+ supported cars.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cupy/cupy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cupy/cupy
Language: python
NumPy & SciPy for GPU

ns0:entry.ns0:title: frappe/frappe
ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Low code web framework for real world applications, in Python and Javascript

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hugohe3/ppt-master
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hugohe3/ppt-master
Language: python
AI generates a real, editable PowerPoint from any document — native shapes & animations, speaker notes voiced as audio narration, and the option to follow your own .pptx template, not slide images · by Hugo He

ns0:entry.ns0:title: interviewstreet/hiring-agent
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/interviewstreet/hiring-agent
Language: python
AI agent to evaluate and score resumes.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills
Language: python
817 structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents · Mapped to 6 frameworks: MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2.0, MITRE ATLAS, D3FEND, NIST AI RMF & MITRE F3 (Fight Fraud) · agentskills.io standard · Works with Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Codex CLI, Cursor, Gemini CLI & 20+ platforms · 29 security domains · Apache 2.0

ns0:entry.ns0:title: opendatalab/MinerU
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/opendatalab/MinerU
Language: python
Transforms complex documents like PDFs and Office docs into LLM-ready markdown/JSON for your Agentic workflows.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/scikit-learn/scikit-learn

ns0:entry.ns0:title: stanford-oval/storm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/stanford-oval/storm
Language: python
An LLM-powered knowledge curation system that researches a topic and generates a full-length report with citations.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: topoteretes/cognee
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/topoteretes/cognee
Language: python
Cognee is the open-source AI memory platform for agents. Give your AI agents persistent long-term memory across sessions with a self-hosted knowledge graph engine.
